member.name: P:Microsoft.DotNet.Cli.Utils.DotnetFiles.VersionFile
member.summary: The SDK ships with a .version file that stores the commit information and SDK version

member.name: P:Microsoft.DotNet.Cli.Utils.DotnetVersionFile.BuildRid
member.summary: The runtime identifier (rid) that this CLI was built for.
member.remarks: This is different than RuntimeInformation.RuntimeIdentifier because the BuildRid is a RID that is guaranteed to exist and works on the current machine. The RuntimeInformation.RuntimeIdentifier may be for a new version of the OS that doesn't have full support yet.

member.name: T:Microsoft.DotNet.Cli.Utils.VerbosityOptions
member.summary: Represents the desired verbosity level for command output. Maps mostly to MSBuild's verbosity levels. The odd naming is because we're currently leaning entirely on System.CommandLine's default enum parsing.
